# CSV Data Catalog

This catalog describes every CSV currently stored under `data/`.

It is intended to let another agent understand what data exists, how each file is structured, and where to find a small representative sample without reopening the original large files.

- CSV file count: `706`
- combined CSV size: `43.94 GB`
- sample mirror root: `catalog/samples`

## Area summary

| Area | Files | Combined size | Combined rows | What it is |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: | --- |
| `CCM` | 1 | 1.61 GB | 612,664 | WRDS CCM-linked Compustat export. This is the bridge between Compustat fundamentals (`gvkey`) and CRSP identifiers (`lpermno`). |
| `Fama–French` | 1 | 296.79 KB | 4,002 | Factor or market-style benchmark data used for portfolio and asset-pricing context. |
| `Treasurey_Daily_Time_Series` | 1 | 186.80 MB | 638,246 | Daily Treasury series. Macro rate history at daily frequency. |
| `Treasurey_Term_structure` | 1 | 73.61 MB | 168,438 | Treasury term-structure level data. Cross-maturity rate panel. |
| `bond_return` | 1 | 1.04 GB | 3,806,033 | Bond-level or bond-index return series used for fixed-income research. |
| `cboe_vix` | 1 | 643.86 KB | 6,573 | VIX history and related market-volatility data. |
| `comp_na_daily_all_annual` | 1 | 467.91 MB | 167,644 | Compustat North America annual fundamentals export. |
| `daily_market_index` | 1 | 854.19 KB | 6,517 | Daily market index history used for broad market context or beta controls. |
| `daily_stock` | 1 | 26.31 GB | 49,651,441 | CRSP-like daily stock panel with security identifiers, returns, price, volume, and exchange/type fields. |
| `option_forward_price` | 1 | 10.08 GB | 123,299,526 | Option-level forward or pricing panel. |
| `option_volumne` | 1 | 3.73 GB | 73,699,290 | Option volume/open-interest style panel. Directory name preserves the current repo spelling. |
| `ownership_13F` | 1 | 9.59 MB | 81,036 | 13F institutional holdings data. |
| `processed` | 690 | 450.58 MB | 4,302,681 | Derived outputs generated inside this repo: EDA summaries, research diagnostics, backtest outputs, and report tables. |
| `raw` | 1 | 1.31 MB | 106,542 | Raw or near-raw extracted supporting data, currently mainly IBES linkage/reference files. |
| `reit` | 1 | 5.77 MB | 26,068 | REIT-related market or accounting dataset. |
| `risk_free_rate` | 1 | 102.27 KB | 708 | Risk-free rate history used for excess-return calculations. |
| `treasurey_and_inflation` | 1 | 63.39 KB | 300 | Combined Treasury and inflation macro panel. |
